title: Navier-Stokes Energy Cascade Tropical Semiring v2

analysis.object: T461: Navier-Stokes Energy Cascade Tropical Semiring v2 depth analysis

kolmogorov_v2.description: E(k) ~ k^{-5/3}: EML-2 power law measurement

tropical_scale.description: Each scale: tropical MAX from all larger scales
tropical_scale.reason: tropical MAX = EML-2 at each scale

blowup_from_cascade.description: Cascade singularity: EML-3 → EML-inf at finite time

cascade_v2_law.description: T461: NS cascade = tropical MAX (EML-2) + intermittency (EML-3); blowup = Deltad=inf from cascade singularity
